name: lyra-podman-images
description: Minimal, fast, reproducible container images with Podman/Buildah: multi-stage Containerfiles, digest-pinned bases down to scratch/distroless, volatility-ordered layers, cache and secret mounts, multi-arch manifests, registry layer caching, and size budgets — with canonical Node/pnpm, Go, and Python patterns. Integrates with lyra-podman-deploy, lyra-ci-cd-automation, lyra-security-containers.
